title: The Broken Script Spooky Faces
description: This resource pack enhances The Broken Script by adding eerie faces to the R2 Silhouette and Circuit, amplifying the creepy feeling of being watched even more so.
body:
This resource pack will transform, and enhance your Broken Script horror experience.

This resource pack for the Broken Script will transform 2 of the main entities in game, R2 Silhouette and Circuit by adding spine chilling faces to both entities. These unsettling visuals will inject terror into you and your friends playing The Broken Script.

This is based of Swayle's Broken Script videos where the entities have faces.


REQUIRES THE BROKEN SCRIPT
